name: Woven Dot Plaid Shower Curtain Ivory - Threshold™
description:
You'll love the contemporary look this Woven Modern Plaid Shower Curtain from Threshold™ gives your bath space. Showcasing a plaid pattern in black woven on an ivory background, this shower curtain brings modern flair to your bathroom decor, while effortlessly blending with a variety of decor styles and color schemes. Crafted from 100% cotton, this decorative shower curtain features a buttonhole top for easy installation and added convenience.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
